title: aragallus rigens
intro: Aragallus rigens is a perennial herb native to North America, also known as Western Bugleweed or Bugleweed. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Aragallus rigens include its ability to treat anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. Aragallus rigens is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in capsule or tablet form to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
